description_long: This is a modern residential compound consisting of several white, box-shaped houses arranged on a green lawn with paved walkways connecting the buildings. The houses are flat-roofed and feature minimalistic, geometric forms with large, square windows and open courtyards. The layout includes landscaped areas with trees, shrubs, and a driveway leading to the central part of the property. The buildings are separated by green spaces, and some have attached or adjacent garages or carports. The overall design emphasizes open space, clean lines, and functional outdoor areas. The compound is surrounded by a low boundary and features a mix of private and communal zones.
description: A modern, flat-roofed residential compound with multiple white cubic houses, green lawns, and paved walkways. The layout is open and geometric, with landscaped areas and minimalistic design.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the compound from the front, highlighting the main entrance, central walkway, and the arrangement of houses with visible green spaces and trees.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the rear of the compound, displaying the backyards, garages, and the overall depth of the property with more visible landscaping.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a side perspective, emphasizing the separation between the houses, the open courtyards, and the distribution of green areas.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the opposite side, focusing on the driveway, central path, and the alignment of the houses along the main axis.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple, flat-roofed porch with steps and minimalistic door, no decorative columns or overhangs.
